name: gymtrack
description: A local-first workout tracker for CSV imports and manual logging.

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html app.js styles.css exercise-dataset.js www/
scripts.android: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: npm run android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.fdroid:prepare: npm ci && npm run build && npx cap sync android

author: solasmeryl
